transcript: Speaker A: How T-shirt cost? Speaker B: Yeh galat English hai. Shopping mall ya store mein bolna hai: "How much does this T-shirt cost?" [This is incorrect English. In a shopping mall or store, you should say: "How much does this T-shirt cost?"] Speaker A: Achha. How much does this T-shirt cost? [Oh. How much does this T-shirt cost?] Speaker B: Perfect, yeh bilkul sahi hai. [Perfect, this is absolutely correct.] Speaker A: Thanks. Yeh toh aasan tha, par mujhe itni achhi English nahi aati. [Thanks. This was easy, but I don't know English that well.] Speaker B: Main ek AI teacher hoon. SpeakX app par bas aapko har din mere saath 10 se 15 minute English bolne ki practice karni hai, aur main aapko sirf 10 se 15 din mein English bolna sikha doongi. [I am an AI teacher. On the SpeakX app, you just need to practice speaking English with me for 10 to 15 minutes every day, and I will teach you to speak English in just 10 to 15 days.] Speaker A: Ismein phir paise bhi toh zyada lagte honge? [But then, wouldn't it cost a lot of money?] Speaker B: Sirf do rupaye per day mein aap 7 days ka trial le sakte hain. Tum mujhse har din, kahin bhi, kabhi bhi unlimited English conversation practice kar sakte ho. Aur koi bhi galti hogi, main turant usse correct karke de doongi. Bas tum English speaking practice app SpeakX download kar lo. [For just two rupees per day, you can take a 7-day trial. You can practice unlimited English conversation with me every day, anywhere, anytime. And if there's any mistake, I will correct it immediately. Just download the English speaking practice app SpeakX.] Speaker A: Thank you, downloading now!

Perfect, ye bilkul sahi hai. yeh to aasan tha, par mujhe itni achhi English nahi aati. teacher hoon. SpeakX app par bas aapko har din mere sath 10 se 15 minute English practice karni hai, aur main aapko sirf 10 se 15 din mein English bolna sikha doongi. Ismein phir to zyada lagte honge? Sirf do rupaye per day mein 7 days ka trial le sakte hain. Tum mujhse har din, kahin bhi unlimited English practice kar sakte ho. aur galti hogi, main turant usse correct karke de doongi. Bas tum English speaking practice app SpeakX download kar lo. downloading now!
summary: An AI avatar corrects a user's English grammar in a split-screen format. She introduces the SpeakX app as an interactive tool for daily English practice. The ad highlights a low-cost 7-day trial to encourage immediate app downloads.
